name: Better Than"the Best" Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup jalapeno chiles, seeded and chopped
1 tablespoon pickling salt (do not use table salt)
recipeInstructions:
1. Red peppers make a prettier sauce, but green is acceptable. I prefer the flavor of red ones. Use sweet onions like Vidalia or Texas 1020 if possible.
2. Combine tomatoes and vinegar in a large pot and cook for an hour.
3. Add remaining ingredients (except cilantro) to the pot and continue cooking for another 1-2 hours until you achieve your desired consistency.
4. Stir in the chopped cilantro.
5. Pour into hot pint jars and process in a water bath for 15 minutes.
6. Makes about 10 pints.
